title: Z+ Security Withdrawn For Raghav Chadha Amid Rift With AAP; Central Cover Likely Soon
description: AAP MP Raghav Chadha’s Z+ security cover was reportedly revoked last week, even as murmurs of an internal rift within the AAP continue to grow louder. In the interim, the Delhi Police have reportedly been tasked with ensuring his security until a formal central deployment is finalised.
